rationale: Multilingual rendering set (EVAL-R7a / QA-EVAL-R2.8): the SAME grounded fixture rendered EN/DE/RU MUST carry identical numeric values and citations, stay jargon-free, and leak no untranslated internal token. Numbers are locale-stable (decimal point kept) so a downstream consumer reads the same canonical value in every language. QA-EVAL-R2.8 adds a mid-conversation language SWITCH (the same grounded numbers/citations persist after the athlete switches language) and an unsupported-language FALLBACK (fall back to English + a human-readable notice, never silent-untranslated, never fabricated). The FALLBACK case is asserted on the projection/voice surface because the engine has no dedicated unsupported-language fallback path yet (FLAGGED to the owner).

renders.en: Your fitness is holding steady at 72.4, with form a touch negative at -7.7.
renders.de: Deine Fitness liegt stabil bei 72.4, die Form leicht negativ bei -7.7.
renders.ru: Твоя форма держится на уровне 72.4, свежесть немного в минусе: -7.7.

renders.en: Recovery looks solid this morning, around 58 today.
renders.de: Die Erholung sieht heute Morgen gut aus, rund 58 heute.
renders.ru: Восстановление этим утром хорошее, около 58 сегодня.

renders.en: Your fitness is holding steady at 72.4, with form a touch negative at -7.7.
renders.de: Deine Fitness liegt stabil bei 72.4, die Form leicht negativ bei -7.7.

cases.rationale: QA-EVAL-R2.8: the athlete asks in English then SWITCHES to German mid-conversation. The SAME grounded numbers (72.4, -7.7) and the SAME citation persist across the switch — language is a presentation knob over the grounded thread (VOICE-R1), it never re-grounds or drifts the numbers.

renders.en: Heads up: I can't yet answer in your requested language, so here's English. Your fitness is holding steady at 72.4.

notice_tokens: can't yet answer in your requested language
cases.rationale: QA-EVAL-R2.8: an unsupported requested locale falls back to English (LANG-R4) AND carries a human-readable NOTICE telling the athlete the fallback happened — never a silent untranslated answer and never a fabricated translation. Asserted on the projection/voice surface: the engine has NO dedicated unsupported-language fallback path yet (FLAGGED), so this case pins the contract the surface must satisfy.
